content.title: Marcus Goes to the Playground  -  A Bluey Adventure

scenes.text: My name is Marcus. Sometimes I go to the playground at school.
scenes.illustration_note: Marcus standing near the playground, looking at the equipment from a distance. Bright but not overwhelming colors.

scenes.text: The playground can be noisy with lots of kids. That's okay. I can wear my headphones if it's too loud.
scenes.illustration_note: Playground with several children playing. Marcus wearing headphones, looking calm. Sound wave icons shown softly.

scenes.text: When I want to go on the slide, I walk to the ladder and wait my turn. Bluey waits for her turn too!
scenes.illustration_note: Marcus standing behind one child at the slide ladder. Small Bluey cartoon character waiting beside him, smiling.

scenes.text: I climb the ladder one step at a time. I hold on with both hands. My teacher is nearby if I need help.
scenes.illustration_note: Marcus climbing ladder with both hands gripping rungs. Teacher/aide standing nearby with encouraging expression.

scenes.text: At the top, I sit down on the slide. I put my feet in front of me. Feet first is the safe way!
scenes.illustration_note: Marcus sitting at top of slide, feet pointing down. A 'feet first' visual cue with a checkmark.

scenes.text: I slide down! It feels fast and fun. When I get to the bottom, I walk away from the slide so the next person can go.
scenes.illustration_note: Marcus sliding down with a smile. At bottom, arrow showing him walking to the side. Another child waiting at top.

scenes.text: If I feel scared, I can say 'help' or press HELP on my talker. My teacher will come right away.
scenes.illustration_note: Marcus on climbing equipment looking uncertain. AAC device shown with HELP button highlighted. Teacher approaching.

scenes.text: The playground is a fun place. I can climb, slide, and play near my friends. I am brave like Bluey!
scenes.illustration_note: Marcus at the bottom of the big slide, smiling proudly. Bluey character giving a thumbs up beside him. Other children nearby.

review_questions: Show me: what do you hold when you climb? (Point to the ladder rungs)
Show me on your talker: what do you press if you need help?
How do we sit on the slide? (Feet first  -  show with gesture)
